page_metadata.biotools__summary: Custom made algorithm and associated methods for finding, visualising and analysing biclusters in large gene expression data sets. Algorithm is based on with a supplied gene set of size n, finding the maximum strength correlation matrix containing m samples from the data set.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Custom made algorithm and associated methods for finding, visualising and analysing biclusters in large gene expression data sets. Algorithm is based on with a supplied gene set of size n, finding the maximum strength correlation matrix containing m samples from the data set.
